programme.desc: Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Montebello, where there are a number of lockers for auction; Brandi has the resale market covered; Ivy mines his way into some vintage safety gear.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon need to secure merchandise for their Website; an exhausted Ivy switches into robot mode; Rene dresses for success; Jarrod and Brandi try a new strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy hunts for high-end items in Moreno Valley; Jarrod reveals his alter ego to Brandi; Darrell flies solo; Rene has a close encounter with death.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders; when Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Garland, Texas, Flash Shelton and his team help a family repossess their deceased brother's home from a squatter who moved in on the day that their brother died.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Kory and Mackenzie bought land to build their future home in rural Spokane, Washington; however, squatters have taken it over and are impacting the nearby property; with the site completely trashed and interactions becoming hostile, Flash and his team step into one of their most unpredictable situations yet.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash heads to Philadelphia to help Paul, who returns from a stint in Vegas to start a family with his fiancée, only to find a stranger has taken over his Pennsylvania home; when Flash confronts multiple occupants, tensions mount, culminating in a boiling standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In North Carolina, a shady real estate scam leaves Tamera fighting squatters who've seized her beautiful 58-acre property, with her beloved horses trapped inside; as the squatters taunt Flash and his team, tensions explode in a desperate fight to reclaim the land and rescue the animals.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Two brothers find themselves in a heated showdown with a group of Alabama golfers during an afternoon on the back nine.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, a man's refusal to move his van from the middle of the road quickly lands him in handcuffs; in Pennsylvania, a Halloween party takes a terrifying turn when an angry man crashes through the front door; and in Washington state, a heated confrontation erupts when a vocal protester targets a dog owner.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Neighbors in Dayton, Ohio quarrel after construction nails apparently litter a yard where children play; in Olympia, Wash., a couple is awoken by the sound of a neighbor playing basketball against their garage door.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio, tensions between two families boil over as both sides accuse the other's children of bullying. In Alabama, an off-duty police officer is struck by a neighbor furious over loud music. And in Florida, a woman's frustration over backyard noise turns destructive when she punches a hole straight through her neighbor's fence.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman in rural Iowa angrily scolds her neighbor about the smoke from burning yard waste; a man in Buffalo backs into a neighbor's van in the driveway and the commotion causes a stir in the community.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Oregon, a family is stunned to learn they've been living next door to a wanted felon; on a California beach, a man flying a remote-controlled plane clashes with a neighbor; and in North Carolina, a volunteer firefighter races home after his doorbell camera alerts him to a possible intruder.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: After a California woman removes a fence along her property line, her relationship with the neighbors turns sour; a neighbor in Santa Monica woken up by a loud gathering and unleashes her fury on the party throwers.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Crossed words between neighbors turn serious with an exchange of gunfire; a woman hiking in mountains is harangued by a neighbor who thinks she is trespassing on his property; a party-loving couple clashes with their neighbors over noise.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Sacramento, a neighbor mistakenly believes two women exchanging hair products in the park are actually selling drugs; a belligerent woman smashes her neighbor's window in Virginia; neighbors in Canada clash about a lawn care specialist.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A video gamer is so spooked by would-be burglars that he opens fire through the door of his Dallas apartment building; a neighbor driving a golf cart subdues a stranger smashing up property in Illinois.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman and her sisters are moving in when a new neighbor takes issue with their discarded furniture; a package delivery triggers a full-on raid; a peaceful day at the boat dock erupts when an angry man threatens a neighbor with a "toothpick.".

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An irate homeowner complains that her neighbors are smoking too close to her house; an Atlanta woman is not feeling blessed when her neighbor splashes her door with holy water.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Tennessee, a wrong-way confrontation at an apartment complex erupts into a shouting standoff with a surprising twist; in South Bend, Ind., a long-running feud over dogs, trash and surveillance turns toxic when one neighbor resorts to biological warfare; in Austin, Texas, a hallway dispute spirals from noise complaints into a battle of doorbell camera taunts.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In California, a man threatens a couple with pepper spray over their dog's behavior; in Georgia, a construction crew faces off with a neighbor determined to shut them down; in Kentucky, a woman renting out her home gets a wake-up call from a neighbor about a loud party at the property.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a man claims possession of a cherished family lake house in New York, Flash and his team race to reclaim it. Convinced he knows the law, the combative squatter refuses to budge, escalating tensions at every turn. With Flash going undercover next door, can he gather the intel he needs to outsmart the squatter and take back the home?

programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Jon Culshaw in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Rooman and Richard dream of buying a holiday bolthole in sunny Fuengirola for quick getaways whenever they get the chance. Can Jean Johansson find them the one for their budget of £130k.

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: From bobbing businesses to continuous cruisers, we meet the vibrant community who live on the canals. Debs and Mick meet a Canal and River Trust legend on their way into Liverpool.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Sasha turn their front steps into a stunning feature for the wedding season. Can Nick and Nicole finish their new dining room in time for their son's first birthday party.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Andrew host the week's second visit at Cae Court Hotel in Bridgend, where the B&Bers raise a tostada to a brilliant Spanish brekkie.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bristol, Alexis serves up Caribbean food and hopes to easel-y grab the grand with a spot of painting.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: The teams make savoury mille-feuille, babka buns and biscuit showpieces adorned with petit gâteaux. Who rises to the challenge and whose time in the competition will crumble away.

programme.title: The Light in the Hall: Still Waters
programme.desc: The community mourns a beloved resident as Eve struggles with guilt, and Mabli and Hari decide to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A man has been run over by a lorry at work. Elizabeth has a head wound from falling while cleaning a pub. And retired coal miner Alan reminisces about going down the pit aged 15.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Decorator Philip has fallen 12 feet from a ladder. Liam flew off the back of a motorbike at high speed. And three-year-old Jonah has injured his elbow while playing with his mum.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics help a teen motorcyclist who's been hit by a car and catapulted into the air. A holiday fitness workout ends in CPR. And a lorry driver is trapped in his cabin.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the second half of a two-part Nightmare in LA, can Gordon Ramsay bring together the fragmented Saffron family and save their failing restaurant.

programme.title: Jon Snow: A Last Big Story
programme.desc: Faced with a diagnosis of Alzheimer's, Jon Snow rediscovers his purpose doing what he's always done, exposing injustice as he fights for a Zambian community destroyed by a mining disaster.

programme.title: Iris Prize Best British Shorts
programme.desc: Two Black Boys in Paradise: BAFTA-winning, Iris Prize nominated short film. A moving animation based on Dean Atta's poem. Two teens go on a journey of self-acceptance and love.

programme.title: Free Nelson Mandela
programme.desc: The hit protest song Sun City and a Wembley concert help turn the tide as US banks pull out of South Africa. At last, apartheid falters and Mandela walks free. But at what cost.

programme.title: George Clarke's American Adventure
programme.desc: George visits New Jersey and Connecticut, checking out Wildwood's neon signs and doo wop diners, and a broken-down zoo that's returned to life as a quirky hotel.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: On the Isle of Wight, restorer Ronnie relives his past life in Ibiza via a three-wheeled trike.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Jon Culshaw in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Days of Wine and Neuroses: Robin proposes to Rebecca and wants to marry her when he gets out of jail, but she gets cold feet. Frasier's hooked on the new karaoke machine.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Robin hires a music star to sing at his wedding to Rebecca, who's forgotten her cold feet, but Sam's request makes her change her tune about the marriage.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: I'm Getting My Act Together and Sticking It in Your Face: Rebecca struggles to come to terms with the fact that she's broken off her marriage to Robin.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's upset when his parents swap the personalised toaster he gave them as a Christmas present for a coffee machine.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray seeks revenge when he finds out that Frank let him win a game of table tennis when he was 12 years old.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Trapped in his home with a broken leg and a pair of binoculars, Castle comes to believe he has witnessed a murder in a nearby property.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Claw wounds and giant footprints at the murder scene of a Bigfoot researcher convince Castle that the killer may be the legendary beast.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: We discover how even in our inner cities, bird watching is something any of us can do, as we follow The Urban Birder, David Lindo.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Kent: The Garden of England
programme.desc: In this edition we join harvests for hops and oysters, travel down the beautiful River Stour, watch the annual Weald of Kent ploughing match, and explore the Samphire Hoe nature reserve.

programme.title: Secrets of the River Mersey
programme.desc: The incredible history of the Mersey. The river is at the heart of the nation's shipbuilding industry, and, during World War II would produce a new warship every three weeks.

programme.title: Reuben Owen: Life in The Dales
programme.desc: It's springtime in the Dales, and at Brough Castle Farm, Reuben and Jess race to stock-proof the fences before more than 300 newborn lambs arrive in the fields.

programme.title: Riptide
programme.desc: Alison's suspicions grow when she learns that Sean and his son Ethan argued on the beach. And Michael and Hannah's friend Logan have a secret connection. With Benny Turland.

programme.title: Aces of Tennis: The ATP No
programme.desc: As competition increased in the 1990s, this episode details the power, precision, and pressure that defined that decade, when reaching the top spot became harder than ever.

programme.title: Murder Scene: The Incident Room
programme.desc: In Swindon, 60-year-old Tom Rogers was brutally stabbed by a stranger. Investigators must piece together every shred of evidence to see whether the same killer has attacked before.

programme.title: Britain's Most Dangerous Prisoners
programme.desc: James O'Rourke's reputation has made him one of the UK's most feared prisoners. He's attacked prison officers, even holding some hostage, and in 2022 murdered a fellow inmate.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.

programme.title: Garden Makeovers from Hell
programme.desc: Garden disasters including a dream garden destroyed by flood, a tree surgeon whose chainsaw catches fire, and Martin Roberts accidentally rubbing poison in his eyes.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica invites all those without prior plans to Thanksgiving dinner, but soon wishes she hadn't. Joey gets some embarrassing modelling work.

programme.title: Friends
